description_long: This apartment building is a compact, two-story structure with a modern, minimalist design. The front facade features large, floor-to-ceiling windows with horizontal blinds, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The exterior walls are smooth and painted in a light, neutral color, with subtle architectural detailing such as a recessed entry door and a small window above it. The rear and side facades are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy and security. The interior appears to include wooden partitions and some visible furnishings, suggesting a functional and contemporary living space. The building's flat roof and clean lines further reinforce its modern architectural style.
description: A modern, two-story apartment building with large front windows, smooth light-colored walls, and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: The front view shows two stories of large, floor-to-ceiling windows with horizontal blinds, revealing some interior details.
description_view_1: The rear view is mostly solid with no windows, highlighting the building's privacy-focused design.
description_view_2: The side view displays a single entrance door and a small window above, with minimal additional detailing.
description_view_3: The opposite side view features a single window and a black horizontal accent, with a mostly solid wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in large, symmetrical groupings on the front facade, spanning both floors, while the other sides have minimal or single window openings.
